---
layout: page
permalink: /
---

<style>
/* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.dbb-hero-wrap {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0d2137 0%, #1B4F72 55%, #2471a3 100%);
  min-height: 400px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: -1rem -15px 2rem;
}
.dbb-hero-wrap::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 28px 28px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.dbb-hero-inner {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.6rem;
  max-width: 800px;
  width: 100%;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  text-align: center;
}
.dbb-logo-box {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1rem 2.2rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}
.dbb-logo-box img { height: 88px; width: auto; display: block; }
.dbb-hero-inner h1 {
  font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: #fff;
  font-family: Georgia, serif; margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.dbb-hero-inner h1 strong { font-weight: 700; color: #AED6F1; }
.dbb-hero-inner p { font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin: 0 0 1rem; }
.dbb-stats {
  display: flex; gap: 0.9rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.dbb-stat {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem; text-align: center;
}
.dbb-stat .num { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #AED6F1; line-height: 1; }
.dbb-stat .lbl { font-size: 0.68rem; opacity: 0.8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
.dbb-btns { display: flex; gap: 0.65rem; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; margin-top: 0.3rem; }
.dbb-btn {
  display: inline-block; padding: 0.55rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none !important; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.dbb-btn-p { background: #AED6F1; color: #0d2137 !important; }
.dbb-btn-p:hover { background: #fff; }
.dbb-btn-o { border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); color: #fff !important; }
.dbb-btn-o:hover { border-color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

/* ── ALT KISIM düzenlemeler ────────────────────────── */
.home-col-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #1B4F72; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-left: 3px solid #2E86C1; padding-left: 0.5rem;
}

@media(max-width:600px) {
  .dbb-hero-inner h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
  .dbb-logo-box img { height: 62px; }
  .dbb-logo-box { padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem; }
}
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="dbb-hero-wrap">
  <div class="dbb-hero-inner">
    <div class="dbb-logo-box">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dijital Beşeri Bilimler Araştırma Merkezi — DARIAH-EU Türkiye Ortağı">
    </div>
    <h1>DH Atlas <strong>Türkiye</strong></h1>
    <p>Türkiye Dijital Beşeri ve Sosyal Bilimler Haritası</p>
    <div class="dbb-stats">
      <div class="dbb-stat"><div class="num">266</div><div class="lbl">Çalışma</div></div>
      <div class="dbb-stat"><div class="num">524</div><div class="lbl">Araştırmacı</div></div>
      <div class="dbb-stat"><div class="num">13</div><div class="lbl">Disiplin</div></div>
      <div class="dbb-stat"><div class="num">17</div><div class="lbl">Yöntem</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dbb-btns">
      <a href="browse.html" class="dbb-btn dbb-btn-p">Kataloğu Keşfet →</a>
      <a href="map.html" class="dbb-btn dbb-btn-o">Haritada Gör</a>
      <a href="istatistikler.html" class="dbb-btn dbb-btn-o">İstatistikler</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CB KUTUCUKLARI (orijinal yapı korundu) -->
<div class="row">
  <div class="col-md-8">
    {% include index/description.html %}
    {% include index/carousel.html title="Öne Çıkan Çalışmalar" %}
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-4">
    {% include index/time.html %}
    {% include index/featured-terms.html field="alan" title="Disiplin Alanları" btn-color="primary" %}
    {% include index/featured-terms.html field="yontem" title="Yöntemler" btn-color="outline-secondary" %}
    {% include index/content.html %}
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-12">
    {% include index/data-download.html %}
  </div>
</div>
